data.name: PromotionType_BuyAmountOfXForFixedPriceOrDiscount_Info

data.name: PromotionType_BuyAtLeastXForFixedPriceOrDiscount
data.value: Buy at least X for a fixed price or a fixed discount

data.name: PromotionType_BuyAtLeastXForFixedPriceOrDiscount_Info

data.name: PromotionType_BuyXGetAmountForFreeWithinDifferentSelection_Info

data.name: PromotionType_BuyXGetAmountForFreeWithinSameSelection

data.name: PromotionType_BuyXGetAmountForFreeWithinSameSelection_Info
